name: @inky/worker
description: Inky's hosted worker — reads its Config from Postgres (the tenant rows the dashboard writes) and hot-reloads it, so schedule/setting changes take effect with no redeploy. The no-redeploy alternative to `inky serve --config <file>` (which stays the zero-Postgres self-host path). Depends on both @inky/core and @inky/db, which is why the DB config source is wired here rather than in core.
